purpose: Exact public official Romanian payment destinations from Wave Next research; masked Trezorerie placeholders excluded from exact safe matching.
rules: Only exact, structurally valid IBANs were imported as can_contribute_to_safe=true.
IBANs containing X placeholders were skipped because they cannot support exact beneficiary/payment destination confirmation.
Duplicate IBANs already present in existing payment_destination_registry_ro_*.json files were skipped.
Raw IBANs are backend seed only; client display uses masked IBANs.

notes: All emitted IBANs validated with RO IBAN length/mod97 where structurally possible.
Manual official utility/local-tax sources were prioritized; non-duplicate P0 service/IMM records were appended from the same-day internal candidate wave after dedupe.
Invalid or duplicate candidate IBANs skipped: 0.

trust_tiers.T1_PUBLIC_OFFICIAL: Published by the merchant/institution on an official webpage or official public document.
